#flashcards/German

## A

- **Apfel** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) apple (fruit); (Proper noun) a surname<br>**IPA:** /ňąapÕ°flŐ©/<br>**Grammar:** der; Plural: die √Ąpfel<br>**Example:** *Der Apfel ist eine Obstart.*<br>![[audio/De-Apfel.mp3]]
<!--SR:!2026-07-15,4,270-->

- **auch** :: **Meaning:** (Adverb) also, too, as well (in addition to whatever or whoever has previously been listed); (Interjection) in answering a yes-no question, used to express that the thing asked about covers part of the truth but not all of it; ‚Äúyes, and more‚ÄĚ<br>**IPA:** /a äŐĮx/<br>**Example:** *Er machte es auch so wie die Anderen.*<br>![[audio/De-auch.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

## B

- **Bank** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) bench (which people sit on); pew; (Noun) bank (financial institution)<br>**IPA:** /baŇčk/<br>**Grammar:** die; Plural: die B√§nke<br>**Example:** *Sollen wir uns auf diese Bank setzen?*<br>![[audio/De-Bank.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Baum** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) tree; (Proper noun) a surname<br>**IPA:** /ba äŐĮm/<br>**Grammar:** der; Plural: die B√§ume<br>**Example:** *Die Verliebten haben ein Herz in den Baum geritzt.*<br>![[audio/De-Baum.mp3]]
<!--SR:!2026-07-12,1,230-->

- **Beispiel** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) example<br>**IPA:** /ňąba…™ŐĮňĆ Épiňźl/<br>**Grammar:** das; Plural: die Beispiele<br>**Example:** *Nehmen wir eine indogermanische Sprache, zum Beispiel das Niederl√§ndische.*<br>![[audio/De-Beispiel.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

- **bitte** :: **Meaning:** (Adverb) please, if you please (used to make a polite request or affirm an offer); (Interjection) you're welcome (acknowledgement of thanks)<br>**IPA:** /ňąb…™t…ô/<br>**Example:** *Gibst du mir das Buch bitte wieder.*<br>![[audio/De-bitte-2.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Buch** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) book (collection of sheets of paper bound together to hinge at one edge; long work fit for publication); (Noun) omasum, the third compartment of the stomach of a ruminant<br>**IPA:** /buňźx/<br>**Grammar:** das; Plural: die B√ľcher<br>**Example:** *In einer Bibliothek werden B√ľcher gesammelt und den Benutzern zur Verf√ľgung gestellt.*<br>![[audio/De-Buch.mp3]]

- **Bus** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) bus (public transport)<br>**IPA:** /b äs/<br>**Grammar:** der; Plural: die Busse<br>**Example:** *Ich habe leider den Bus verpasst.*<br>![[audio/De-Bus.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **B√ľro** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) office (room for working)<br>**IPA:** /byňą Āoňź/<br>**Grammar:** das; Plural: die B√ľros<br>**Example:** *Ich sa√ü in meinem B√ľro.*<br>![[audio/B√ľro-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

## C

- **Computer** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) computer (programmable electronic device that performs mathematical calculations, logical operations, and usually also data retrieval/storage)<br>**IPA:** /k…Ēmňąpjuňźt…ź/<br>**Grammar:** der; Plural: die Computer<br>**Example:** *Wer am Computer sitzt vergisst schnell die Zeit.*<br>![[audio/Computer-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

## D

- **danke** :: **Meaning:** (Verb) inflection of danken: first-person singular present first/third-person singular subjunctive I singular imperative; (Interjection) thanks, thank you<br>**IPA:** /ňądaŇčk…ô/<br>**Example:** *Danke f√ľr das Wiktionary!*<br>![[audio/danke-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

## E

- **E-Mail** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) e-mail (system; letter)<br>**IPA:** /ňąiňźme…™ŐĮl/<br>**Example:** *Ich schicke dir N√§heres per E-Mail.*<br>![[audio/De-E-Mail.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Es geht mir gut.** :: **Meaning:** I'm doing well. _(source: DW Hallo! course PDF -- not in Wiktionary)_<br>![[audio/Es_geht_mir_gut.-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

## F

- **Familie** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) family<br>**IPA:** /faňąmiňźliŐĮ…ô/<br>**Grammar:** die; Plural: die Familien<br>**Example:** *Beide Frauen stammen aus Gro√üst√§dten, beide wuchsen in b√ľrgerlichen Familien heran.*<br>![[audio/De-Familie.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Fenster** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) window<br>**IPA:** /ňąf…õnst…ź/<br>**Grammar:** das; Plural: die Fenster<br>**Example:** *Alle Fenster standen offen.*<br>![[audio/De-Fenster.mp3]]
<!--SR:!2026-07-12,1,230-->

- **Flughafen** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) airport<br>**IPA:** /ňąfluňźkňĆhaňźfnŐ©/<br>**Grammar:** der; Plural: die Flugh√§fen<br>**Example:** *F√ľr uns am n√§chsten ist der Flughafen Hannover.*<br>![[audio/Flughafen-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Frau** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) woman (adult female human)<br>**IPA:** /f Āa äŐĮ/<br>**Grammar:** die; Plural: die Frauen<br>**Example:** *Sie ist eine berufst√§tige Frau.*<br>![[audio/De-Frau.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

## G

- **Gitarre** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) guitar<br>**IPA:** /…°iňąta Ā…ô/<br>**Grammar:** die; Plural: die Gitarren<br>**Example:** *An einem Lagerfeuer darf die Gitarre nicht fehlen.*<br>![[audio/De-Gitarre.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **gut** :: **Meaning:** (Adjective) good (acting in the interest of what is beneficial, ethical, or moral); (Adverb) well (accurately, competently, satisfactorily)<br>**IPA:** /…°uňźt/<br>**Example:** *Es geht mir gut.*<br>![[audio/gut-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

- **Guten Abend.** :: **Meaning:** Good evening. _(source: DW Hallo! course PDF -- not in Wiktionary)_<br>![[audio/Guten_Abend.-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo
<!--SR:!2026-07-15,4,270-->

- **Guten Morgen.** :: **Meaning:** Good morning. _(source: DW Hallo! course PDF -- not in Wiktionary)_<br>![[audio/Guten_Morgen.-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo
<!--SR:!2026-07-15,4,270-->

- **Guten Tag.** :: **Meaning:** Hello.; Good day. _(source: DW Hallo! course PDF -- not in Wiktionary)_<br>![[audio/Guten_Tag.-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

## H

- **Hallo!** :: **Meaning:** Hello! _(source: DW Hallo! course PDF -- not in Wiktionary)_<br>![[audio/Hallo_-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

- **Hey!** :: **Meaning:** Hey! (borrowed from English) _(source: DW Hallo! course PDF -- not in Wiktionary)_<br>![[audio/Hey_-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

- **Hi!** :: **Meaning:** Hi! (borrowed from English) _(source: DW Hallo! course PDF -- not in Wiktionary)_<br>![[audio/Hi_-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

- **Hobby** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) a hobby (activity)<br>**IPA:** /ňąh…Ēbi/<br>**Grammar:** das; Plural: die Hobbys<br>**Example:** *In der Pension kann er endlich seinen Hobbys nachgehen.*<br>![[audio/Hobby-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Hund** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) dog, hound<br>**IPA:** /h änt/<br>**Grammar:** der; Plural: die Hunde<br>**Example:** *Der Hund bellt.*<br>![[audio/De-Hund.mp3]]
<!--SR:!2026-07-15,3,250-->

## I

- **Information** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) information _(direct cognate; not found via API, filled manually)_<br>**IPA:** /…™nf…Ē ĀmaňątÕ°siŐĮoňźn/<br>**Grammar:** die; Plural: die Informationen<br>**Example:** *Ich nehme Informationen auf und verarbeite sie weiter.*<br>![[audio/Information-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

## K

- **Katze** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) house cat, Felis silvestris catus<br>**IPA:** /ňąkatÕ°s…ô/<br>**Grammar:** die; Plural: die Katzen<br>**Example:** *Die Katze schl√§ft auf dem Sofa.* _(hand-written -- every Wiktionary example for this word is a literary quotation)_<br>![[audio/De-Katze.mp3]]
<!--SR:!2026-07-12,1,230-->

- **Kein Problem.** :: **Meaning:** No problem. _(source: DW Kein Problem! course PDF -- not in Wiktionary)_<br>![[audio/Kein_Problem.-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Kino** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) cinema<br>**IPA:** /ňąkiňźno/<br>**Grammar:** das; Plural: die Kinos<br>**Example:** *Wir sind ins Kino gegangen.*<br>![[audio/Kino-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Kultur** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) culture<br>**IPA:** /k älňątuňź…źŐĮ/<br>**Grammar:** die; Plural: die Kulturen<br>**Example:** *Was ist nicht alles Kultur?*<br>![[audio/Kultur-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

## M

- **Mann** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) man, male human being<br>![[audio/Mann-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

- **Milch** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) milk (white liquid produced by female mammals for their young to consume)<br>**IPA:** /m…™l√ß/<br>**Grammar:** die<br>**Example:** *Nimmst du den Kaffee mit Milch und Zucker?*<br>![[audio/De-Milch.mp3]]
<!--SR:!2026-07-12,1,230-->

- **Museum** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) museum (building or institution dedicated to the protection and exhibition of items with scientific, historical, cultural or artistic value)<br>**IPA:** /muňązeňź äm/<br>**Grammar:** das; Plural: die Museen<br>**Example:** *Ein Besuch des Museums lohnt sich immer.*<br>![[audio/Museum-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

## N

- **nicht** :: **Meaning:** (Adverb) not, non- (negates the meaning of a verb, adjective, or adverb); (Interjection) right?; is it?; is it not?<br>**IPA:** /n…™√ßt/<br>**Example:** *Sie kommt nicht.*<br>![[audio/De-nicht.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

- **nicht so gut** :: **Meaning:** not so good _(source: DW Hallo! course PDF -- not in Wiktionary)_<br>![[audio/nicht_so_gut-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

## O

- **okay** :: **Meaning:** (Interjection) OK; (Adjective) OK<br>![[audio/okay-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

## P

- **Pilot** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) pilot (one who steers an aircraft)<br>**IPA:** /piňąloňźt/<br>**Grammar:** der; Plural: die Piloten<br>**Example:** *Nur Piloten d√ľrfen ans Steuer dieses Passagierjets.*<br>![[audio/Pilot-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Pilotin** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) female equivalent of Pilot (‚Äúpilot‚ÄĚ): female pilot<br>**IPA:** /piňąloňźt…™n/<br>**Grammar:** die; Plural: die Pilotinnen<br>**Example:** *Pilotinnen √ľben einen sehr verantwortungsvollen Beruf aus.*<br>![[audio/Pilotin-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Pizza** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) pizza<br>**IPA:** /ňąp…™tÕ°sa/<br>**Grammar:** die<br>**Example:** *Italien ist das Land von Pizza und Pasta.*<br>![[audio/Pizza-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Problem** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) problem<br>**IPA:** /p Āoňąbleňźm/<br>**Grammar:** das; Plural: die Probleme<br>**Example:** *Wir haben ein schwerwiegendes Problem!*<br>![[audio/Problem-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

## R

- **Restaurant** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) restaurant<br>**IPA:** / Ā…õstoňą Ā…ĎŐÉňź/<br>**Grammar:** das; Plural: die Restaurants<br>**Example:** *Ich kenne bessere Restaurants.*<br>![[audio/Restaurant-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

## S

- **Schule** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) school (an institution dedicated to teaching and learning (especially before university); department/institute at a college or university; art movement; followers of a particular doctrine)<br>**IPA:** /ňą Éuňźl…ô/<br>**Grammar:** die; Plural: die Schulen<br>**Example:** *Ich gehe zur Schule.*<br>![[audio/De-Schule.mp3]]

- **sch√∂n** :: **Meaning:** (Adjective) beautiful, lovely, pretty, handsome; (Adverb) well, beautifully<br>**IPA:** / É√łňźn/<br>**Example:** *Sie hat sch√∂nes Haar. Das Musikst√ľck ist sch√∂n.*<br>![[audio/De-sch√∂n.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

- **sehr gut** :: **Meaning:** very well; very good _(source: DW Hallo! course PDF; Wiktionary's own entry is the unrelated "school grade" sense)_<br>![[audio/De-sehr_gut.mp3]] #lesson/hallo
<!--SR:!2026-07-14,3,250-->

- **Sport** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) sport, sports _(direct cognate; not found via API, filled manually)_<br>**IPA:** / Ép…Ē Āt/<br>**Grammar:** der; Plural: die Sporte<br>**Example:** *Viel Sport f√∂rdert die Gesundheit.*<br>![[audio/Sport-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Student** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) student (person attending lectures at a university; male or of unspecified sex)<br>**IPA:** / Étuňąd…õnt/<br>**Grammar:** der; Plural: die Studenten<br>**Example:** *Sind Sie Student dieser Universit√§t?*<br>![[audio/Student-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Stuhl** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) a chair (to sit on)<br>**IPA:** / Étuňźl/<br>**Grammar:** der; Plural: die St√ľhle<br>**Example:** *Auf diesem Stuhl kann man bequem sitzen.*<br>![[audio/De-Stuhl.mp3]]
<!--SR:!2026-07-12,1,230-->

- **super** :: **Meaning:** (Adjective) super, great, awesome<br>**IPA:** /ňązuňźp…ź/<br>**Example:** *Meine Frau hat das super gemacht.*<br>![[audio/super-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

## T

- **Tag** :: **Meaning:** (Interjection) hello; (good) day; (Noun) tag (label)<br>**IPA:** /taňźk/<br>**Grammar:** der; Plural: die Tage<br>**Example:** *W√§hrend des Tages scheint die Sonne.*<br>![[audio/De-Tag.mp3]]

- **Taxi** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) taxi, cab<br>**IPA:** /ňątaksi/<br>**Example:** *Das Taxi kam nicht.*<br>![[audio/Taxi-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Telefon** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) telephone<br>**IPA:** /ňąteňźl…ôfoňźn/<br>**Grammar:** das; Plural: die Telefone<br>**Example:** *Mensch, geh doch mal ans Telefon!*<br>![[audio/Telefon-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Theater** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) theater (a place or building consisting of a stage and seats)<br>**IPA:** /teňąaňźt…ź/<br>**Grammar:** das; Plural: die Theater<br>**Example:** *Das Theater wird renoviert.*<br>![[audio/Theater-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Tisch** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) table (a piece of furniture with a relatively deep surface at roughly waist or knee level); specific uses include: dining table, dinner table<br>**IPA:** /t…™ É/<br>**Grammar:** der; Plural: die Tische<br>**Example:** *Der Tisch steht direkt neben dem Herd.*<br>![[audio/De-Tisch.mp3]]

- **Toilette** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) toilet<br>![[audio/Toilette-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

## U

- **Uhr** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) hours, o'clock (indicates the time within a twelve- or twenty-four-hour period)<br>**IPA:** /uňź…źŐĮ/<br>**Grammar:** die; Plural: die Uhren<br>**Example:** *Er sah nach der Uhr.*<br>![[audio/De-Uhr.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

- **und** :: **Meaning:** (Conjunction) and; (Interjection) so?, now?, and?<br>**IPA:** / änt/<br>**Example:** *Die Sonne scheint und es ist warm.*<br>![[audio/und-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

- **Und dir?** :: **Meaning:** How about you? (informal) _(source: DW Hallo! course PDF -- not in Wiktionary)_<br>![[audio/Und_dir_-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

- **Und Ihnen?** :: **Meaning:** How about you? (formal) _(source: DW Hallo! course PDF -- not in Wiktionary)_<br>![[audio/Und_Ihnen_-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo
<!--SR:!2026-07-12,1,230-->

## W

- **Wasser** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) water (H‚āāO)<br>**IPA:** /ňąvas…ź/<br>**Grammar:** das<br>**Example:** *Auch sie sprang ins Wasser.*<br>![[audio/De-Wasser.mp3]]
<!--SR:!2026-07-12,1,230-->

- **Wie geht es dir?** :: **Meaning:** How are you? (informal) _(source: DW Hallo! course PDF -- not in Wiktionary)_<br>![[audio/Wie_geht_es_dir_-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

- **Wie geht es Ihnen?** :: **Meaning:** How are you? (formal) _(source: DW Hallo! course PDF -- not in Wiktionary)_<br>![[audio/Wie_geht_es_Ihnen_-tts.mp3]] #lesson/hallo

- **Winter** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) winter; (Proper noun) a surname<br>**IPA:** /ňąv…™nt…ź/<br>**Grammar:** der; Plural: die Winter<br>**Example:** *Im Winter ist es kalt, es liegt oft Schnee.*<br>![[audio/De-Winter.mp3]] #lesson/jahreszeiten

## Z

- **Zentrum** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) center, centre central point, the middle, e.g. of a circle; (Proper noun) the Centre Party, a Catholic political party, chiefly in Imperial Germany and the Weimar Republic<br>**IPA:** /ňątÕ°s…õnt Ā äm/<br>**Grammar:** das; Plural: die Zentren<br>**Example:** *Dort geht es ins Zentrum der Stadt.*<br>![[audio/Zentrum-tts.mp3]] #lesson/kein-problem

- **Zimmer** :: **Meaning:** (Noun) room (separate part of a building, enclosed by walls, a floor and a ceiling); (Proper noun) a surname<br>**IPA:** /ňątÕ°s…™m…ź/<br>**Grammar:** das; Plural: die Zimmer<br>**Example:** *Diese Wohnung hat drei Zimmer.*<br>![[audio/De-Zimmer.mp3]]
